properties.Test Case: Art of Reading. 1) In an image container which is empty, hover mouse and click button to access Image Toolbox. 2) Type a search criteria for AoR 3) Click on magnifying glass 4) Click top-right X to close dialog. Ensure dialog closes without issues. Repeat 1-3 but in step 4 click Cancel. Repeat again and click OK.
properties.Steps: Art of Reading. 1) In an image container which is empty, hover mouse and click button to access Image Toolbox. 2) Type a search criteria for AoR 3) Click on magnifying glass 4) Click top-right X to close dialog. Ensure dialog closes without issues. Repeat 1-3 but in step 4 click Cancel. Repeat again and click OK.

properties.Test Case: Try various Copyright and Licensing options: a) Public Domain, b) various CC, c) all rights reserved d) custom. Ensure that settings stick and all types are possible.
properties.Steps: Try various Copyright and Licensing options: a) Public Domain, b) various CC, c) all rights reserved d) custom. Ensure that settings stick and all types are possible.

properties.Test Case: Copyright propogation. Copy some internet images into a bunch of pages. Set copyright for a single image -- make sure ? changes to C. Set copyright for another image and this time propogate to all images. Ensure propogation occurred.
properties.Steps: Copyright propogation. Copy some internet images into a bunch of pages. Set copyright for a single image -- make sure ? changes to C. Set copyright for another image and this time propogate to all images. Ensure propogation occurred.

properties.Test Case: Super large image. Import the two Starry Night images in \Bloom Team\Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing\Images\Van Gogh via Image Toolbox. (Bloom 6.3+) Both images should succeed and should shrink to about 3535x2800. No out of memory errors.
properties.Steps: Super large image. Import the two Starry Night images in \Bloom Team\Testing\Materials for Bloom Editor Testing\Images\Van Gogh via Image Toolbox. (Bloom 6.3+) Both images should succeed and should shrink to about 3535x2800. No out of memory errors.

properties.Test Case: Super large image. In File Explorer, select an image and type CTRL C. In Bloom, select an image container and paste in the image using Bloom's paste icon. - Both Starry_Night_1.jpg and Starry_Night_2.jpg should succeed and shrink to about 3535x2800. [Paste does not work for "copy path" in Bloom 6.3.]
properties.Steps:
Super large image. In File Explorer, select an image and type CTRL C. In Bloom, select an image container and paste in the image using Bloom's paste icon.
- Both Starry_Night_1.jpg and Starry_Night_2.jpg should succeed and shrink to about 3535x2800.  [Paste does not work for "copy path" in Bloom 6.3.]
